![gtactwpsp](https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/gtactwpsp/main2.jpg)

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to swap R-button/Cross and L-button/Square in vehicles. Use the emulator settings to swap these buttons with triggers and drive using triggers.

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to swap R-button/Circle on foot.

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to activate the 3rd person camera. Press DPAD-RIGHT to switch between cameras. Use the Right Stick to adjust position and angle. The original cinematic camera will be disabled.

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to enable the radio in emergency vehicles.

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to speed up the emulator during loading screens.

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to unlock Xin missions in the replay board.

    Installation:
        Download and extract the archive to the directory, where PPSSPP's memstick folder is located. 

[Website](https://thirteenag.github.io/wfp#gtactwpsp) | [Source](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/source/GTACTW.PPSSPP.FusionFix/main.c) | [Default INI File](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/data/GTACTW.PPSSPP.FusionFix/memstick/PSP/PLUGINS/GTACTW.PPSSPP.FusionFix/GTACTW.PPSSPP.FusionFix.ini)
